changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql:
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_EXERCISES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE
changeSet.rollback: DROP SEQUENCE SEQ_EXERCISES; DROP SEQUENCE SEQ_EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE EXERCISES ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, VOCABULARY_WORD_ID NUMBER, TYPE VARCHAR2(30) NOT NULL, QUESTION CLOB NOT NULL, OPTIONS CLOB, CORRECT_ANSWER CLOB NOT NULL, EXPLANATION CLOB, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_EXERCISES PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_EXERCISE_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_EXERCISE_VOCAB FOREIGN KEY (VOCABULARY_WORD_ID) REFERENCES VOCABULARY_WORDS (ID), CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISE_TYPE CHECK (TYPE IN ( 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE','FILL_BLANK','WORD_ORDER', 'TRANSLATION','TRUE_FALSE','SENTENCE_BUILDING' )), CONSTRAINT CK_EXERCISES_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS ( ID NUMBER NOT NULL, EXERCISE_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, USER_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, STUDY_SESSION_ID NUMBER, USER_ANSWER CLOB NOT NULL, IS_CORRECT NUMBER(1) NOT NULL, TIME_SPENT_SECONDS NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP NOT NULL, ACTIVE NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_EXERCISE_ATTEMPTS PRIMARY KEY (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_ATTEMPT_EXERCISE FOREIGN KEY (EXERCISE_ID) REFERENCES EXERCISES (ID), CONSTRAINT FK_ATTEMPT_USER FOREIGN KEY (USER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (ID), CONSTRAINT CK_ATTEMPT_CORRECT CHECK (IS_CORRECT IN (0, 1)), CONSTRAINT CK_ATTEMPT_TIME CHECK (TIME_SPENT_SECONDS >= 0), CONSTRAINT CK_ATTEMPT_ACTIVE CHECK (ACTIVE IN (0, 1)) )

changeSet.author: englishmemory
